ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the state */,
  "average_rent" INTEGER /* Average monthly rent in the state */,
  "average_mortgage" INTEGER /* Average monthly mortgage in the state */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a high school diploma */,
  "college_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a college degree */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square mile) */,
  "gdp" INTEGER /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value */,
  "median_rental_price" INTEGER /* Median rental price */,
  "median_mortgage_payment" INTEGER /* Median mortgage payment */,
  "poverty_line" INTEGER /* Poverty line income for a family of four */,
  "health_insurance_coverage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with health insurance */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a high school diploma */,
  "college_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a college degree */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "racial_diversity_index" REAL /* Index measuring racial diversity */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "foreign_born_population" INTEGER /* Number of foreign-born residents */,
  "native_born_population" INTEGER /* Number of native-born residents */,
  "age_distribution_0_17" INTEGER /* Population aged 0-17 */,
  "age_distribution_18_24" INTEGER /* Population aged 18-24 */,
  "age_distribution_25_44" INTEGER /* Population aged 25-44 */,
  "age_distribution_45_64" INTEGER /* Population aged 45-64 */,
  "age_distribution_65_plus" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 and over */,
  "gender_distribution_male" INTEGER /* Number of males */,
  "gender_distribution_female" INTEGER /* Number of females */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the state */,
  "average_rent" INTEGER /* Average monthly rent in the state */,
  "average_mortgage" INTEGER /* Average monthly mortgage in the state */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "employment_industry_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employment by industry */,
  "unemployment_claim_rate" REAL /* Unemployment claim rate */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "minimum_wage" INTEGER /* Minimum wage */,
  "poverty_rate_below_50_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population below 50% of the poverty line */,
  "poverty_rate_below_100_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population below 100% of the poverty line */,
  "poverty_rate_below_150_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population below 150% of the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission_mapping" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the documentation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the documentation was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_documentation_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_documentation_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
